user_prompt: X3 game circular avatar frame, World Cup / soccer theme, FRANCE — MID tier (between plain base and ornate epic). Reference image 1 (plain base) is TOO plain; reference image 2 (heavy gold) is TOO ornate. Aim for the MIDDLE: tasteful, moderately decorated. KEEP the FRANCE national colors (blue-white-red tricolor) clearly DOMINATING the ring band. GOLD is a SUPPORTING accent only — slim gold edge trim on the ring + a few modest gold metal pieces, NOT the main material, NO huge gold wings, NO big gem cabochons. Add MODERATE ornament vs the plain base: a small tasteful gold ornament cradling the soccer ball at bottom-center (small laurel sprigs or short ribbon tails, compact — not big wings), a small neat gold crest node at top-center, and 1-2 small gold clip accents on the sides. Keep it balanced and clean, not busy. A stylized soccer ball at bottom-center with tricolor accents. Art style: X3 clean cel-shaded cartoon game-UI, soft flat cel shading, clean crisp outlines, bright saturated colors. NOT painterly, NOT realistic, NOT gold-baroque. Square 1:1, circular hollow center fully transparent for avatar, fully transparent background, readable at 256x256, NO text, NO flag cloth over top, NO scene background.
